prompt: Create a square 1:1 synthwave disco album cover for a track titled MIRROR MIRROR by PZF. Show two stylish adult figures standing back-to-back in a smoky nightclub beneath a huge mirrored disco ball that dominates the upper center of the frame. The left figure is a woman with voluminous shoulder-length auburn curls wearing a glossy red leather jacket, angled slightly left with one hand near her pocket; the right figure is a man with slick dark hair wearing a glossy black leather blazer over an open white shirt, angled slightly right. Their faces should be intentionally obscured by soft rectangular blur blocks, preserving the anonymous editorial look. Use dramatic magenta, violet, electric blue, and hot pink lighting, with horizontal neon tube lights in the background, thick purple fog, reflective highlights on the leather, and a cinematic 1980s club atmosphere. Place exactly 2 text elements: the large title “MIRROR MIRROR” across the lower third in italic all-caps futuristic neon typography, white core with pink glow and slight bevel; and the smaller artist text “PZF” centered beneath it near the bottom in spaced-out italic letters. Keep the composition symmetrical, glossy, high contrast, and photo-realistic, with no extra logos, borders, stickers, or additional text.
